mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and driving positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer spending and declining corporate earnings growth, causing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in over 65 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio falls below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable inflation indicates robust consumer demand without monetary tightening pressure, generating positive forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of cases, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in rolling regressions.

mechanism_narrative: During tightening cycles, industrial production growth outpacing monetary contraction signals resilient corporate output capacity, driving positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in over 60 percent of tightening regime observations, or predictive accuracy drops below 50 percent in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts reflect expanding construction activity and rising consumer confidence, which translates to higher corporate revenues and positive equity market returns.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between housing starts and 20-day forward returns remains below 0.01 across all rolling 3-year windows, or signal loses predictive power after controlling for rates.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds 250, elevated inflation erodes real corporate margins and prompts aggressive central bank policy, resulting in negative forward returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in over 70 percent of high-inflation observations, or inflation threshold fails to separate return distributions at the 5 percent significance level.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in total employment and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm genuine labor market tightening, boosting equity valuations through higher earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Interaction signal yields negative 20-day returns in more than 58 percent of cases, or joint labor indicator shows no incremental predictive value over single-series models.

mechanism_narrative: In late-cycle expansions, slowing real GDP growth alongside rising interest rates compresses profit margins and equity multiples, producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Combined signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns with accuracy above 52 percent, or regime-conditional outperformance vanishes in out-of-sample backtests.
